LanguageData.CSGLog: Foutopsporingslogboek voor het genereren van structuren inschakelen:
LanguageData.NeedRestart: Alle instellingen moeten opnieuw worden opgestart om te worden toegepast
LanguageData.NeedToBeInGame: U moet eerst een opgeslagen bestand laden
LanguageData.AskForPopUpExplained: Click this to be asked for each faction if you want it to be added to your game
LanguageData.CanAddXFaction: {0} faction(s) can be added to your current save
LanguageData.VEF.Shields.ExplanationTitle: Set weapons to be usable or not usable with shields.
LanguageData.VEF_NeverDesc: Never unforbid mined ores (this is how the base game works for non-human pawns, such as animals and mechs)
LanguageData.VEF_HomeAreaDesc: Ores mined by pawns are only unforbidden if mined in the home area
LanguageData.VEF_AlwaysDesc: Ores mined by pawns are always unforbidden
